chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5946 of 2019 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on CMA No.27799/2021 2. For hearing of CMA No.26327/2019 3. For hearing of main case 24.03.2025 Mr. Muhammad Nadeem Qureshi, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, advocate for respondent This petition pertains to G.D. dated 30.08.2019. It is jointly submitted that the grievance in regard thereof went through the consecutive stages of show cause notice, order-in-original etc.; culminating in the release of goods. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that a subsequent grievance has arisen whereby it is contended that the consignment released thereto is deficient in quantum. Learned counsel for the petitioner has no cavil to the observation that the relief sought herein has become infructuous in view of adjudication and release already having taken place. Learned counsel also admits that the grievance of short delivery is subsequent to the ambit hereof. Therefore, while the petitioner remains at liberty to agitate any claim for short delivery before the forum of appropriate jurisdiction, this petition appears to have served its purpose and is disposed of accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
